_comment: RenderTrust Cloudflare WAF Custom Rules Template
These rules are written in Cloudflare's custom rules format and can be
imported via the Cloudflare dashboard (Security > WAF > Custom Rules) or
IMPORTANT: Review and adjust thresholds before deploying to production.
Rate limits, IP allowlists, and challenge conditions should be tuned
based on observed traffic patterns after initial deployment.

rules.description: Rate limit API endpoints -- 100 requests per minute per IP

response.content: {"error":"Rate limit exceeded. Please retry after 60 seconds.","retry_after":60}

rules.description: Block SQL injection patterns in URL and query string
rules.expression: (http.request.uri contains "UNION SELECT" or http.request.uri contains "1=1" or http.request.uri contains "' OR '" or http.request.uri contains "'; DROP" or http.request.uri contains "--" and http.request.uri contains "SELECT")

rules.description: Block XSS patterns in URL parameters
rules.expression: (http.request.uri contains "<script" or http.request.uri contains "javascript:" or http.request.uri contains "onerror=" or http.request.uri contains "onload=" or http.request.uri contains "%3Cscript")

rules.description: Allow Stripe webhook IPs -- bypass rate limiting and challenges
rules._note: Stripe publishes webhook IPs at https://stripe.com/docs/ips. These ranges may change; verify periodically.

rules.description: Challenge requests with suspicious or empty user agents
rules.expression: (http.user_agent eq "" or http.user_agent contains "sqlmap" or http.user_agent contains "nikto" or http.user_agent contains "masscan" or http.user_agent contains "ZmEu" or http.user_agent contains "dirbuster")
(http.request.uri contains "../" or http.request.uri contains "..%2f" or http.request.uri contains "%2e%2e/" or http.request.uri contains "%2e%2e%2f")

rules.description: Stricter rate limit on authentication endpoints -- 20 requests per minute per IP

response.content: {"error":"Too many authentication attempts. Please retry after 60 seconds.","retry_after":60}
